# Fort Bend County SBDC - Richmond Local Routing for Houston/77084

## Why this resource matters to Houston/77084 routing
Fort Bend County SBDC - Richmond is relevant to the Houston-area SBDC search context. Important proximity check for 77084/west Houston/Katy/Southwest Harris users. Verify with the official locator.

## Service area
Fort Bend, Matagorda, Wharton, and Southwest Harris per the UH locations catalog

## Contact
- Address: 1116 Morton Street, Richmond, TX 77469
- Phone: 713-743-5550
- Email: sbdcfortbend@uh.edu
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 8:00 a.m.-5:00 p.m.

## BOSS routing notes
- Use the SBA ZIP locator as the official entry point.
- Ask for the user's business address ZIP/county before final office routing.
- For a user in 77084, do not assume the center solely from city name; verify service-area fit.
